general.prompt: Which show's cast cleaned up at the Emmy nominations with a whopping 13 acting nods?
general.summary: The cast of 'The Pitt' earned 13 Emmy acting nominations in its first season.

general.prompt: Which country cried foul over biased officiating in a World Cup match?
general.summary: Egypt complained that officials were biased in their 3-2 loss to Argentina in the World Cup round of 16.

general.prompt: What vintage aircraft did Trump fly on partway home from Turkey?
options: A hot air balloon painted like Air Force One
general.summary: President Trump flew partway home from a NATO summit on an old Air Force One plane instead of the new Qatari-gifted plane.

general.prompt: After Trump declared the ceasefire 'over', what did the U.S. and Iran do?
options: Held a joint bake sale for peace
general.summary: The U.S. and Iran traded more strikes after Trump said the ceasefire was over.

general.prompt: What is Ukraine's drone strategy doing to Russian refineries and NATO's plans?
options: Wreaking havoc and upending NATO investment
Making Russia switch to wind power
general.summary: Ukraine's deep drone strikes on Russian refineries are reshaping the war and pushing NATO toward a $40 billion counter-drone plan.

tech.prompt: Persona 4’s getting a revival and someone’s getting a personality tweak! Which character is apparently becoming less of a jerk?
options: Teddie, now a real boy with a driver's license
The protagonist, now voiced by a potato
Chie, who will finally stop asking for steak
tech.summary: The Persona 4 revival producer confirmed character changes, notably making Yosuke less abrasive.

tech.prompt: PS5 owners are ditching PlayStation Plus to protest Sony killing physical discs. What do analysts say about this rebellion?
options: It might delay the next GTA update
It will inspire a new 'digital-only' tariff on clouds
It will force Sony to bring back floppy disks
tech.summary: Analysts say the cancellation of PS Plus subscriptions won't change Sony's decision to stop releasing games on discs.

tech.prompt: NASA is funding hardware for a new Mars helicopter mission called 'Skyfall'. When do they hope to launch this sky-high sequel?
options: 2025, but only if Elon Musk finishes the tunnel
2027, just before the next Persona revival
2042, to match the game's release date
tech.summary: NASA aims to launch the Skyfall Mars helicopter mission in 2028.

tech.prompt: GTA Online’s having a shorter event week with Independence Day rewards and discounts. What big update is coming next week?
tech.summary: The Kortz Center Heist update releases next week in GTA Online.

tech.prompt: A new browser extension helps you dodge Amazon’s sea of knock-off products. What’s its unfortunate side effect?
options: It makes Amazon’s brand names look even bleaker
It reveals the real 'Yosuke' is a knock-off too
It turns all product images into potatoes
tech.summary: The extension makes Amazon's brand names look even bleaker.

business.prompt: What did the U.S. do to Iran after Trump said he might not negotiate?
options: Opened the first Freedom Fuel gas station in Tehran
Sent a diplomatic gift basket filled with dates and oil
Invited Iran to a friendly chess match on neutral ground
business.summary: The U.S. launched fresh strikes on Iran after President Trump said he may no longer be interested in negotiating a deal.

business.prompt: Where did the first Trump-backed Freedom Fuel gas station open?
options: Downtown Tehran (with a 'Made in USA' sign)
A farm in Iowa where John Deere tractors refuel
business.summary: The first Freedom Fuel gas station opened in Philadelphia, offering gasoline for about 50 cents below the statewide average.

business.prompt: Why are state AGs suing over the Paramount–Warner Bros. Discovery merger?
options: To force the new company to air only cat videos
To block a deal involving Elon Musk's SEC settlement
Because the merger would create too many superhero movies
business.summary: State attorneys general are finalizing an antitrust lawsuit challenging Paramount’s pending acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery.

business.prompt: What’s the good news for John Deere owners under the new FTC settlement?
options: They can trade in their tractor for a Freedom Fuel discount
They can fix their own equipment
Deere will now manufacture only pink tractors
They get a free lifetime supply of tractor-shaped cookies
business.summary: John Deere owners will gain the right to repair their own equipment under a new FTC settlement.

business.prompt: Despite his ‘misgivings,’ what did the judge approve for Elon Musk?
options: Permission to rename the SEC as the 'Musk Compliance Agency'
A lifetime ban from tweeting about hamsters
A merger between Paramount and Warner Bros. Discovery
business.summary: A judge approved Elon Musk’s $1.5 million SEC settlement over his disclosure of a stake in Twitter.

sports.prompt: Which country cried foul after a World Cup loss, blaming the refs like a sore loser at a backyard BBQ?
options: White Sox considering three hitters for No. 1 pick
sports.summary: Egypt complained about biased officiating after losing 3-2 to Argentina in the World Cup round of 16.

sports.prompt: Which Red Sox slugger got a boo-boo on his foot from a foul ball and had to leave the game, but says 'no biggie'?
options: Egypt complains officials were biased in World Cup loss to Argentina
sports.summary: Willson Contreras exited a game with a left foot contusion after being hit by a foul ball.

sports.prompt: Who finally broke his silence about a civil rape case, claiming he's an 'innocent man' in a very serious 'Midnight Mania' segment?
options: Chicago Cubs vs. Baltimore Orioles Results
The entire White Sox draft board
sports.summary: Conor McGregor addressed being found civilly liable for rape, maintaining his innocence.

sports.prompt: Which MLB team is agonizing over three high school and college hitters for the top draft pick, like it's choosing a life partner?
options: Midnight Mania! ‘Innocent Man’ Mac Finally Addresses Civil Rape Case
sports.summary: The White Sox are deciding between Roch Cholowsky, Grady Emerson, and Vahn Lackey for the No. 1 pick.

sports.prompt: What was the July 8, 2026 MLB matchup between the Chicago Cubs and Baltimore Orioles?
options: White Sox considering three hitters for No. 1 pick
sports.summary: The Cubs and Orioles played on July 8, 2026, with results tracked by CBS Sports.

science.prompt: Which brainy sea creature just shattered a long-held rule about why animals evolve intelligence?
science.summary: Octopuses defy the belief that large brains relative to body size are linked to social species.

science.prompt: How much of the deep seafloor have humans actually seen after 70 years of exploration?
options: An area the size of Rhode Island
An area the size of Texas
science.summary: Human visual observation covers less than 0.001% of the deep seafloor, about the size of Rhode Island.

science.prompt: What historic feat did a SpaceX Falcon 9 rocket achieve on July 9?
options: Carried the first octopus to space
science.summary: A Falcon 9 rocket launched for a record-breaking 36th time early on July 9.

science.prompt: What new ability does the latest CRISPR method give to scientists?
science.summary: A new CRISPR method allows control of protein production in cells.

science.prompt: What did the Artemis II astronauts do three months after their record-breaking flight?
science.summary: Artemis II astronauts reunited with their capsule and launch team at Kennedy Space Center.
